projectDescription: A VS Code extension that brings Hermes Agent directly into your editor — chat with your code, apply diffs, and control the agent without leaving VS Code.
keyFeatures: In-editor AI chat with real-time streaming responses
Editor Tools Bridge — agent reads active file, open tabs, diagnostics, and cursor context
Model picker with live per-token pricing grouped by provider
Hermes profile auto-discovery and quick-switch selector
Diff viewer — preview proposed code changes before applying
Multi-session tabs with local persistence and context attachment
CodeLens actions: Ask Hermes about file, Explain this function
MCP server forwarding from Cursor/VS Code config
Environment detection (L0–L5) with auto-install of ACP dependencies
publicApiSurface: hermes.sendSelection — Insert editor selection into chat
hermes.askAboutFile — Pre-fill prompt about the active file
hermes.explainFunction — Pre-fill prompt to explain a symbol
hermes.showDiff — Open visual diff of proposed changes
hermes.previewDiff — Preview changes as a diff
hermes.applyDiff — Apply proposed changes to disk
hermes.openControlCenter — Open the embedded Hermes dashboard
hermes.path setting — Path to the Hermes executable
hermes.cwd setting — Working directory for sessions
hermes.showToolCalls setting — Show tool call notifications
hermes.contextAttachVisibility setting — Session memory picker visibility
